agents.name_invalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores allowed
monitor.curator.no_runs: Runs appear here after the curator executes
monitor.failures.title: Session Failures
monitor.failures.subtitle: Structured log of failed sessions ({{total}} total)
doctor.title: Doctor
doctor.subtitle: System diagnostics
doctor.needs_attention: One or more systems need attention
doctor.error: Failed to load diagnostics. Is the server reachable?
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait 5 minutes or restart the service.
setup.enter_llm_api_key: Enter your LLM API key. This is needed for the AI agent to work.
setup.name: Name
setup.connect_telegram_bot: Connect a Telegram bot (optional). You can add channels later from the UI.
setup.requirements_warn: Some checks have warnings — you can still proceed
setup.provider_test_fail: API key validation failed — no models returned. Check your key and try again.
chat.write_message_to_start: Write a message to get started
chat.delete_all_confirm_description: All {{count}} sessions of agent {{agent}} and all message history will be permanently deleted.
agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Manage agent configurations
agents.icon_save_agent_first: Save the agent first, then upload its icon
agents.tool_dispatcher_hint: Reduces context by ~10k tokens. The agent discovers most tools on demand via tool_use(...). New agents may need a few extra turns to discover tools.
agents.tool_dispatcher_base_note: when this base agent is spawned as a subagent by another agent, it always receives the full tools array regardless of any subagent_dispatcher_enabled setting. Base agents bypass the dispatcher because they perform privileged system tasks.
agents.tool_dispatcher_core_extra_hint: Tool names to keep in the tools array even when the dispatcher is enabled. Names in the deny list, base-only tools (for non-base agents), or unknown tools are silently dropped.
agents.tool_dispatcher_core_extra_placeh: Type a tool name and press Enter
agents.tool_dispatcher_promotion_max_hin: 0–16 — cap on tools auto-promoted into the array per session
agents.hint_sr_min_tool_calls: Review runs after sessions with ≥ N tool calls
agents.delete_channel_description: The channel will be stopped and permanently deleted.
agents.delete_agent_description: The agent and its configuration will be permanently deleted.
tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Registered integrations
tools.no_external_apis: No external APIs yet. Add a YAML tool to call third-party HTTP endpoints.
tools.no_mcp_servers: No MCP servers yet. Add one to connect external tools over the MCP protocol.
tools.no_handlers: No file handlers registered. Handlers come from toolgate builtins and workspace/file_handlers/*.py.
tools.handler_delete_confirm_description: This workspace handler will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
tools.handler_reset_confirm_description: Your edits will be discarded and the builtin handler will be restored.
tools.handler_code_hint: The descriptor block at the top is kept in sync with the Settings tab. Edit the async def run(ctx, file, params) body below it.
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Registered scenario scripts
skills.priority_hint: Higher value means higher priority when multiple skills match
skills.delete_skill_confirm_description: Skill {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
cron.title: Tasks
cron.subtitle: Scheduled tasks and automations
cron.silent_hint: Core does not announce result — agent sends messages itself via send_message
cron.task_placeholder: Analyze logs and create a report...
cron.cron_validation_error: Requires 5 fields: min hour day month weekday
cron.cron_invalid: Invalid cron expression — must contain exactly 5 fields (e.g. 0 9 * * 1-5)
cron.delete_task_description: The scheduled task will be permanently deleted.
tasks.run_once_description: Execute once and delete the job
tasks.jitter_hint: Random delay 0–N sec before execution. Useful when multiple jobs share the same schedule.
memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Documents and search
memory.delete_chunk_description: This document and all its chunks will be permanently deleted.
watchdog.title: Watchdog
watchdog.subtitle: System health monitoring
watchdog.restart_confirm_body: Restart "{{name}}"? It will be briefly unavailable while it comes back up.
logs.title: Logs
audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Security and system events
secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.subtitle: Manage encrypted environment variables
secrets.delete_description: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Manage incoming webhook endpoints
webhooks.prompt_prefix_placeholder: Optional prefix added before webhook payload...
webhooks.delete_description: Webhook "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
webhooks.hint_generic: Send POST with Authorization: Bearer <secret> header
webhooks.hint_github: Use this URL in GitHub → Settings → Webhooks. Secret will be auto-generated
webhooks.secret_created_warning: Copy the secret now — it will not be shown again. Use it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
webhooks.event_filter_hint: Leave empty to receive all events
webhooks.regenerate_confirm_description: The current secret for "{{name}}" stops working immediately. Any integration using it must be updated.
config.title: Config
config.subtitle: Runtime parameters
config.restart_confirm_description: This will restart the OPEX core process. Active chats and streams will be interrupted for a few seconds while the service comes back.
config.embed_dimensions_description: Requested embedding dimensions (0 = model default). Requires restart.
config.embed_dimensions_hint: Recommended: 1024 — optimal balance (~95% quality, IVFFlat index). 768 — ~93%, 512 — ~90%. Below 512 noticeable loss for multilingual. Above 2000 — no index (sequential scan).
config.agent_tool.title: Multi-agent timeouts
config.agent_tool.description: How long to wait for sub-agents to respond. Increase if cloud LLMs frequently time out.
channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Manage agent communication channels
channels.old_delete_failed: New channel created, but failed to remove old one
channels.delete_confirm: Channel "{{name}}" will be deleted. This action is irreversible.
channels.typing_message: message — during processing and tool calls
channels.typing_hint: When to show "typing..." in the messenger
channels.empty_hint: Add a channel to connect an agent to a messenger
workspace.title: Files
workspace.no_file_hint: Select a file from the browser to edit.
workspace.pdf_load_error: If the PDF did not load —
workspace.delete_recursive_description: Folder "{{name}}" and ALL its contents will be permanently deleted.
workspace.unsaved_description: You have unsaved changes. Save them before continuing, or discard to lose them.
access.title: Access
access.subtitle: Authorization and user pairing
access.revoke_description: {{name}} will be disconnected and must re-authorize to regain access.
usage.title: Statistics
usage.subtitle: LLM API consumption by agents and providers
usage.tracking_hint: Token tracking will start after the first LLM calls
canvas.title: Canvas
canvas.empty_hint: Ask the agent to use the canvas tool to display visual content.
checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.rollback_confirm_description: Restore the agent's files to checkpoint {{n}}
providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage LLM provider connections
providers.empty: No providers configured yet. Create one to reference it from agent config.
providers.delete_description: This will remove the provider connection. Agents using it will fall back to their default provider field.
providers.field_name_hint: Unique identifier for agent config: provider_connection = "my-openai"
providers.field_url_hint: Leave empty to use provider default
providers.no_model_discovery: This provider does not support automatic model discovery. Enter the model name manually.
approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Tool requests awaiting approval
backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Create and restore database backups
backups.large_warning: Large backup ({{size}}). Restore may take a while.
backups.restore_description: This is a DESTRUCTIVE operation. The current database will be replaced with data from backup {{filename}}. This action is irreversible.
backups.auto_backup_desc: Create backups on a cron schedule
backups.cron_hint: 6-field format: sec min hour day month weekday
backups.retention_hint: Backups older than this are deleted automatically
providers.field_voice_hint: Voice from this TTS server. Cloned voices use the 'clone:Name' format.
providers.field_api_key_keep: Leave empty to keep current key
providers.save_first_to_discover: Save the provider first to discover models with your API key.
providers.media_name_hint: Unique name for this provider (e.g. local-whisper, openai-tts)
providers.field_api_key_vault_hint: Stored in encrypted vault. Leave blank when editing to keep existing key.
providers.cap_text_desc: Language models (LLM) for chat and reasoning
providers.cap_embedding_desc: Text vector embeddings for semantic search
providers.cap_websearch_desc: Web search — allows multiple active providers simultaneously
providers.group_hint: Only the highest-priority provider is currently used.
providers.drag_hint: drag a row up to raise its priority
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external services to agents via OAuth 2.0
integrations.redirect_uri_hint: Redirect URI (add to your OAuth app)
integrations.no_accounts_hint: Add an account to connect external services.
integrations.no_repos: No repositories configured. Add repos to enable GitHub tools.
integrations.revoke_confirm_description: Revoke access for "{{name}}"? Agents bound to it will lose access until reconnected.
integrations.delete_confirm_description: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This removes its credentials and any agent bindings.
notifications.title: Notifications
providers.context_window_hint: Per model, in tokens. Leave empty to auto-detect from the provider API; set explicitly only when the API doesn't report it (e.g. MiMo). Use Discover to list models.
providers.context_window_no_models: No models yet — click Discover to list this provider's models, or save the provider first.
skills.restore_confirm_desc: The current skill content will be saved as a snapshot before being replaced. You can undo by restoring from history again.
skills.version_description: Version history — click a version to view content
